topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional

questions.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।
options: If I had known the mistake, I would have corrected it.
If I were a pilot, I would travel the world.
If I were you, I would not do this.
If I had money, I would buy this house.
questions.answer: If I had money, I would buy this house.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।" = "If I had money, I would buy this house."

questions.sentence: If I were you, _____ would not do this.
options: were
called
she
I
questions.answer: I
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If I were you, I would not do this."

questions.sentence: If she knew, she will come.
options: If she knew, she will come.
If she knew, she would come.
questions.answer: If she knew, she would come.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If she knew, she would come."

questions.hindi: अगर मुझे समय मिलता, तो मैं travel करता।
options: If I had a car, I would go to office every day.
If I had gotten this chance earlier, I would have taken it.
If I had worked hard, I would have passed.
If I had time, I would travel.
questions.answer: If I had time, I would travel.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर मुझे समय मिलता, तो मैं travel करता।" = "If I had time, I would travel."

questions.sentence: If I had worked _____ I would have passed.
options: started
honest
told
hard
questions.answer: hard
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If I had worked hard, I would have passed."

questions.sentence: If you had told me, I will have helped.
options: If you had told me, I will have helped.
If you had told me, I would have helped.
questions.answer: If you had told me, I would have helped.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If you had told me, I would have helped."

questions.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आया होता, तो हम मिल पाते।
options: If he had paid attention, this mistake would not have happened.
If I had money, I would buy this house.
If I had known the mistake, I would have corrected it.
If he had come early, we would have met.
questions.answer: If he had come early, we would have met.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर वह जल्दी आया होता, तो हम मिल पाते।" = "If he had come early, we would have met."

questions.sentence: If I had known the _____ I would have corrected it.
options: a
you
were
mistake
questions.answer: mistake
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If I had known the mistake, I would have corrected it."

questions.sentence: If the weather was good, we would go out.
options: If the weather was good, we would go out.
If the weather were good, we would go out.
questions.answer: If the weather were good, we would go out.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If the weather were good, we would go out."

questions.hindi: अगर उसने मुझसे पूछा होता, तो मैं बता देता।
options: If you were in my place, what would you do?
If I had time, I would travel.
If I had a car, I would go to office every day.
If he had asked me, I would have told him.
questions.answer: If he had asked me, I would have told him.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर उसने मुझसे पूछा होता, तो मैं बता देता।" = "If he had asked me, I would have told him."

questions.sentence: If I had a car, I _____ go to office every day.
options: gotten
worked
started
would
questions.answer: would
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If I had a car, I would go to office every day."

questions.sentence: If we had started earlier, we will have finished.
options: If we had started earlier, we will have finished.
If we had started earlier, we would have finished.
questions.answer: If we had started earlier, we would have finished.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If we had started earlier, we would have finished."

questions.hindi: अगर तुम खुश होते, तो मैं भी खुश होता।
options: If we had planned, this problem would not have happened.
If he had come early, we would have met.
If he had paid attention, this mistake would not have happened.
If you were happy, I would be happy too.
questions.answer: If you were happy, I would be happy too.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर तुम खुश होते, तो मैं भी खुश होता।" = "If you were happy, I would be happy too."

questions.sentence: If he had paid attention, _____ mistake would not have happened.
options: money
known
a
this
questions.answer: this
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If he had paid attention, this mistake would not have happened."

questions.sentence: If I was a pilot, I would travel the world.
options: If I was a pilot, I would travel the world.
If I were a pilot, I would travel the world.
questions.answer: If I were a pilot, I would travel the world.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I were a pilot, I would travel the world."

questions.hindi: अगर उसने मुझे फोन किया होता, तो मैं आ जाता।
options: If she knew, she would come.
If he had asked me, I would have told him.
If you were in my place, what would you do?
If he had called me, I would have come.
questions.answer: If he had called me, I would have come.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर उसने मुझे फोन किया होता, तो मैं आ जाता।" = "If he had called me, I would have come."

questions.sentence: If you were in my _____ what would you do?
options: time
a
gotten
place
questions.answer: place
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you were in my place, what would you do?"

questions.sentence: If I had gotten this chance earlier, I will have taken it.
options: If I had gotten this chance earlier, I will have taken it.
If I had gotten this chance earlier, I would have taken it.
questions.answer: If I had gotten this chance earlier, I would have taken it.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I had gotten this chance earlier, I would have taken it."

questions.hindi: अगर वह ईमानदार होता, तो मैं उस पर भरोसा करता।
options: If you had told me, I would have helped.
If you were happy, I would be happy too.
If we had planned, this problem would not have happened.
If he were honest, I would trust him.
questions.answer: If he were honest, I would trust him.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर वह ईमानदार होता, तो मैं उस पर भरोसा करता।" = "If he were honest, I would trust him."

questions.sentence: If we had planned, this _____ would not have happened.
options: come
paid
money
problem
questions.answer: problem
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If we had planned, this problem would not have happened."
